name: EZCORP INC
business: EZCORP, Inc. is a leading provider of pawn services in the United States and Latin America. It advances cash against collateralized personal property and sells pre-owned merchandise forfeited from pawn activities. The company also offers web-based applications for managing pawn transactions.

exposures.sentence: We also offer web-based applications under the name EZ+ that allow customers to manage their pawn transactions, layaways and loyalty rewards online.

catalysts.event: Board approved new share repurchase program
catalysts.sentence: On November 11, 2025, the Board approved a new share repurchase program.
